item.summary: Potential for detachment of a distal tip component of the device during use. Product details: Olympus Thunderbeat II Shears w/Ultrasonic Mode, 5mm, 45cm. Model Number: TB2-0545FC.

item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
